'''âj-k-z''' ('''kajakaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ecstasy|ecstasy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ecstasy|ecstasy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-k-z
|-
! Lemma
| kajakaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijakaz|thijakaz]] || [[word:jijakaz|jijakaz]] || [[word:shijakaz|shijakaz]] || [[word:kijakaz|kijakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujakaz|thuthujakaz]] || [[word:jujujakaz|jujujakaz]] || [[word:shushujakaz|shushujakaz]] || [[word:kukujakaz|kukujakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujakaz|thujakaz]] || [[word:jujakaz|jujakaz]] || [[word:shujakaz|shujakaz]] || [[word:kujakaz|kujakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujakaz|thujakaz]] || [[word:jujakaz|jujakaz]] || [[word:shujakaz|shujakaz]] || [[word:kujakaz|kujakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejakaz|thejakaz]] || [[word:jejakaz|jejakaz]] || [[word:shejakaz|shejakaz]] || [[word:kejakaz|kejakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojakaz|thothojakaz]] || [[word:jojojakaz|jojojakaz]] || [[word:shoshojakaz|shoshojakaz]] || [[word:kokojakaz|kokojakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojakaz|thojakaz]] || [[word:jojakaz|jojakaz]] || [[word:shojakaz|shojakaz]] || [[word:kojakaz|kojakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojakaz|thojakaz]] || [[word:jojakaz|jojakaz]] || [[word:shojakaz|shojakaz]] || [[word:kojakaz|kojakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjakaz|thĂŠjakaz]] || [[word:jĂŠjakaz|jĂŠjakaz]] || [[word:shĂŠjakaz|shĂŠjakaz]] || [[word:kĂŠjakaz|kĂŠjakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajakaz|thathajakaz]] || [[word:jajajakaz|jajajakaz]] || [[word:shashajakaz|shashajakaz]] || [[word:kakajakaz|kakajakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajakaz|thajakaz]] || [[word:jajakaz|jajakaz]] || [[word:shajakaz|shajakaz]] || [[word:kajakaz|kajakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajakaz|thajakaz]] || [[word:jajakaz|jajakaz]] || [[word:shajakaz|shajakaz]] || [[word:kajakaz|kajakaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajakaz|shajakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajakaz|goshajakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajakaz|gokishajakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajakaznĂŒ|shajakaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajakaznknĂŒ|goshajakaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakaznĂŒ|gokishajakaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajakazshĂ«|shajakazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajakaznkshĂ«|goshajakaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajakazshĂ«|gokishajakazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakazro|shajakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajakaznkro|goshajakaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakazro|gokishajakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakazmu|shajakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajakaznkmu|goshajakaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakazmu|gokishajakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajakazsher|shajakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajakaznksher|goshajakaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajakazsher|gokishajakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajakazng|shajakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajakaznkng|goshajakaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajakazng|gokishajakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajakazya|shajakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajakaznkya|goshajakaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajakazya|gokishajakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajakazyam|shajakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajakaznkyam|goshajakaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajakazyam|gokishajakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakaznĂŒshĂ«|shajakaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajakaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshajakaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishajakaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakaznĂŒro|shajakaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajakaznknĂŒro|goshajakaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakaznĂŒro|gokishajakaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakaznĂŒmu|shajakaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajakaznknĂŒmu|goshajakaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakaznĂŒmu|gokishajakaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajakazshĂ«nĂŒ|shajakazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajakaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajakaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajakazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakazshĂ«ro|shajakazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajakaznkshĂ«ro|goshajakaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakazshĂ«ro|gokishajakazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakazshĂ«mu|shajakazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajakaznkshĂ«mu|goshajakaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakazshĂ«mu|gokishajakazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajakazronĂŒ|shajakazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajakaznkronĂŒ|goshajakaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakazronĂŒ|gokishajakazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakazroshĂ«|shajakazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajakaznkroshĂ«|goshajakaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakazroshĂ«|gokishajakazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakazromu|shajakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajakaznkromu|goshajakaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakazromu|gokishajakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajakazmunĂŒ|shajakazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajakaznkmunĂŒ|goshajakaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakazmunĂŒ|gokishajakazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakazmushĂ«|shajakazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajakaznkmushĂ«|goshajakaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakazmushĂ«|gokishajakazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakazmuro|shajakazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajakaznkmuro|goshajakaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakazmuro|gokishajakazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
